CreateAnInstanceBySpecifyingTheInstanceP.{clientToken}: Idempotency token, an ASCII string of up to 64 characters. See [link](BCC/API参考/通用说明.md#幂等性).
CreateAnInstanceBySpecifyingTheInstanceP.zoneName: Availability zone. Query available zones via the list zones API. Naming convention: "country-region-zone", lowercase, e.g., Beijing Zone A is "cn-bj-a". Dedicated instances use the zone of the dedicated host; this field is not required.
CreateAnInstanceBySpecifyingTheInstanceP.spec: Instance package spec for the VM to create, e.g., bcc.g7.c2m8. Use the [instance spec list](https://cloud.baidu.com/doc/BCC/s/Xk3pb75k1) API to view available specs.
CreateAnInstanceBySpecifyingTheInstanceP.imageId: Image ID for the VM to create. Use the [query image list](https://cloud.baidu.com/doc/BCC/s/Ajwvynu5r) API to retrieve the desired image ID.
CreateAnInstanceBySpecifyingTheInstanceP.billing.paymentTiming: Payment method: Prepaid, Postpaid, or bidding (spot instance).
CreateAnInstanceBySpecifyingTheInstanceP.billing.reservation: Reservation info. Not required for postpaid; required for prepaid.
CreateAnInstanceBySpecifyingTheInstanceP.autoRenewTimeUnit: Required if auto-renewal is enabled; leave empty otherwise. Unit: "month" for monthly, "year" for yearly.
CreateAnInstanceBySpecifyingTheInstanceP.autoRenewTime: Required if auto-renewal is enabled; leave empty otherwise. Duration: 1–9 for monthly, 1–5 for yearly.
CreateAnInstanceBySpecifyingTheInstanceP.rootDiskStorageType: System disk media type for the VM. Defaults to high-performance cloud disk (hp1). See <!--Enum-->[StorageType](#StorageType) for supported types.
CreateAnInstanceBySpecifyingTheInstanceP.rootDiskSizeInGb: System disk size in GB. Linux default: 20 GB, range [10, 2048]; Windows default: 40 GB, range [40, 2048]. Must meet the minimum disk space requirement of the selected image.
CreateAnInstanceBySpecifyingTheInstanceP.createCdsList: List of CDS disks to create. See [CreateCdsModel](BCC/API参考/附录.md#CreateCdsModel).
CreateAnInstanceBySpecifyingTheInstanceP.createCdsList.cdsSizeInGB: CDS disk size in GB. Must be a positive integer, range 0–5120.
CreateAnInstanceBySpecifyingTheInstanceP.createCdsList.storageType: CDS disk storage type. Defaults to hp1 (high-performance cloud disk).
CreateAnInstanceBySpecifyingTheInstanceP.createCdsList.snapshotId: Snapshot ID. Used when creating a disk from a snapshot; disk size must not be smaller than the snapshot.
CreateAnInstanceBySpecifyingTheInstanceP.createCdsList.deleteWithInstance: Whether the disk is deleted with the instance. Applies to postpaid billing. Default: false. For V2 API, the cdsAttributeActive parameter must be set to true when releasing the instance.
CreateAnInstanceBySpecifyingTheInstanceP.cdsAutoRenew: [Deprecated; CDS auto-renewal now follows BCC] Whether CDS auto-renews: true or false.
CreateAnInstanceBySpecifyingTheInstanceP.subnetId: Subnet ID. Defaults to the default subnet if not specified.
CreateAnInstanceBySpecifyingTheInstanceP.eniIds: List of short IDs of elastic network interfaces to attach. For batch creation, ENIs are evenly distributed across instances; ensure the count is a multiple of the instance count and does not exceed the per-instance ENI limit. Not supported for EBC bare-metal instances. Maximum 5000 ENIs.
CreateAnInstanceBySpecifyingTheInstanceP.networkPurchaseType: EIP line type: standard BGP (BGP) or enhanced BGP (BGP_S). Defaults to standard BGP.
CreateAnInstanceBySpecifyingTheInstanceP.internetChargeType: Public bandwidth billing method. See [internetChargeType](BCC/API参考/附录.md#InternetChargeType). If not specified, defaults to the same as BCC: prepaid defaults to monthly/yearly by bandwidth; postpaid defaults to pay-by-bandwidth-usage.
CreateAnInstanceBySpecifyingTheInstanceP.networkCapacityInMbps: Public bandwidth in Mbps. For prepaid and postpaid pay-by-bandwidth EIPs: standard BGP 1–500, enhanced BGP 100–5000 (upper limit). For postpaid pay-by-traffic EIPs: standard BGP 1–200 (peak bandwidth limit). 0 means no public IP is allocated. Default: 0.
CreateAnInstanceBySpecifyingTheInstanceP.eipName: Public IP name. 1–65 bytes, must start with a letter, may contain letters, digits, and -_/. characters. Auto-generated if not provided.
CreateAnInstanceBySpecifyingTheInstanceP.isEipAutoRelatedDelete: Whether the postpaid EIP bound to the instance is automatically released with the instance. true/false, default false. Only effective when billing is pay-by-bandwidth or pay-by-traffic.
CreateAnInstanceBySpecifyingTheInstanceP.purchaseCount: Number of VM instances to create in batch. Must be a positive integer. Optional, default: 1.
CreateAnInstanceBySpecifyingTheInstanceP.name: VM name (optional). If specified, used as prefix in batch creation with a suffix appended as: name{-index}. If not specified, auto-generated as: {instance-8-char-random-index}. Random string uses 0–9 and a–z; index increments based on count magnitude. Supports uppercase/lowercase letters, digits, Chinese characters, and -_ /. special characters. Must start with a letter, length 1–65.
CreateAnInstanceBySpecifyingTheInstanceP.hostname: VM hostname (optional). If specified, used as prefix in batch creation with a suffix appended as: name{-index}. If not specified, auto-generated as: {instance-8-char-random-index}. Supports only lowercase letters, digits, and - . special characters. Must start with a letter; consecutive special characters and leading/trailing special characters are not allowed. Length 2–64.
CreateAnInstanceBySpecifyingTheInstanceP.autoSeqSuffix: Whether to auto-generate sequential suffixes for name and hostname. true/false. Optional.
CreateAnInstanceBySpecifyingTheInstanceP.isOpenHostnameDomain: Whether to auto-generate a hostname domain. true/false. Optional.
CreateAnInstanceBySpecifyingTheInstanceP.adminPass: Administrator password for the instance. 8–32 characters, must contain at least three of: uppercase letters, lowercase letters, digits, special characters. Allowed symbols: ()`~!@#$%^&*-_+=|{}[]:;'<>,.?/. Must be transmitted encrypted.
CreateAnInstanceBySpecifyingTheInstanceP.keypairId: ID of the key pair to bind to the instance.
CreateAnInstanceBySpecifyingTheInstanceP.keepImageLogin: Whether to use the preset password from the image. Default: false. If true, adminPass and keypairId must be empty. Only supported for custom images or shared images.
CreateAnInstanceBySpecifyingTheInstanceP.securityGroupId: [Deprecated] Security group ID. Defaults to the default security group if not specified.
CreateAnInstanceBySpecifyingTheInstanceP.securityGroupIds: List of security group IDs. Defaults to the default security group if not specified.
CreateAnInstanceBySpecifyingTheInstanceP.enterpriseSecurityGroupIds: List of enterprise security group IDs. When not empty, securityGroupIds is ignored. Defaults to the default security group if not specified.
CreateAnInstanceBySpecifyingTheInstanceP.relationTag: Whether to apply the same tags to associated resources (CDS data disks, EIPs, snapshots, snapshot chains). Default: false.
CreateAnInstanceBySpecifyingTheInstanceP.isOpenIpv6: Whether to enable IPv6 for the instance. Requires both the image and subnet to support IPv6. true: enable, false: disable. If not set, auto-adapts based on image and subnet IPv6 support.
CreateAnInstanceBySpecifyingTheInstanceP.tags: List of tags to apply to the instance. See [TagModel](BCC/API参考/附录.md#TagModel).
CreateAnInstanceBySpecifyingTheInstanceP.bidModel: Spot instance pricing model: "market" for market price, "custom" for custom price. See [BidModel](BCC/API参考/附录.md#BidModel).
CreateAnInstanceBySpecifyingTheInstanceP.bidPrice: Spot instance bid price in CNY/minute. For custom bids, creation is rejected if the bid is below the market price. Only effective when bidModel='custom'.
CreateAnInstanceBySpecifyingTheInstanceP.dedicatedHostId: Dedicated host ID. Specify to place the VM on a particular dedicated host.
CreateAnInstanceBySpecifyingTheInstanceP.deployId: Deployment set ID for the instance.
CreateAnInstanceBySpecifyingTheInstanceP.deployIdList: List of deployment set IDs for the instance.
CreateAnInstanceBySpecifyingTheInstanceP.userData: User data passed to the instance if the instance meets the requirements. Since API requests do not encrypt UserData, avoid passing sensitive information in plaintext. If required, encrypt and Base64-encode it before passing, and decode it the same way inside the instance.
CreateAnInstanceBySpecifyingTheInstanceP.deletionProtection: Instance deletion protection. Default: 0 (disabled). 1: enabled; prevents manual release of the instance.
CreateAnInstanceBySpecifyingTheInstanceP.isOpenHostEye: Whether to enable host security. true: enable, false: disable. Defaults to enabled if not specified.
CreateAnInstanceBySpecifyingTheInstanceP.hosteyeType: Host security edition. Effective when isOpenHostEye is true. "enterprise": enterprise edition; "open" or not set: basic edition.
CreateAnInstanceBySpecifyingTheInstanceP.resGroupId: ID of the resource group to bind to the instance.
CreateAnInstanceBySpecifyingTheInstanceP.enableJumboFrame: Whether to enable Jumbo Frame. Default: false. Only supported on specs that support Jumbo Frame.
CreateAnInstanceBySpecifyingTheInstanceP.enableHt: Whether to enable HyperThreading (HT). Used for EBC. Default: true.
CreateAnInstanceBySpecifyingTheInstanceP.dataPartitionType: Data disk file system format. Options: xfs, ext4.
CreateAnInstanceBySpecifyingTheInstanceP.rootPartitionType: System disk file system format. Options: xfs, ext4.
CreateAnInstanceBySpecifyingTheInstanceP.fileSystems: List of CFS file systems to mount on the instance.
CreateAnInstanceBySpecifyingTheInstanceP.fileSystems.protocol: CFS file system protocol type. Options: nfs, smb.
CreateAnInstanceBySpecifyingTheInstanceP.disableRootDiskSerial: Whether to hide the system disk serial number (SN) when creating the instance. Default: false. true: hide, false: show.
CreateAnInstanceBySpecifyingTheInstanceP.ehcClusterId: Optional parameter when creating a RoCE instance. Uses the default EHC cluster if not specified.
CreateAnInstanceBySpecifyingTheInstanceP.cpuThreadConfig: Number of threads per physical core (vCPU), controlling whether hyper-threading is enabled per processor. Values: 1 or 2. Default: 2. Only supported on Intel 7th-gen and above or AMD 3rd-gen and above bare-metal instance specs.
CreateAnInstanceBySpecifyingTheInstanceP.numaConfig: CPU NUMA configuration. Intel platform: 0 disables NUMA, 1 enables NUMA. AMD platform: controls NPS (Nodes Per Socket); values 0, 1, 2, 4, auto correspond to NPS0, NPS1, NPS2, NPS4, and auto. Default: NUMA enabled (Intel) / NPS1 (AMD). Only supported on Intel 7th-gen and above or AMD 3rd-gen and above bare-metal instance specs.
